---
title: "convert_raw_underway"
output: html_document
---

# load required packages

```{r}

library(here)
library(dplyr)
library(purrr)
library(ggplot2)
#remotes::install_github("WHOIGit/ediutilities")
#library(ediutilities)
library(lubridate)
library(readr)
library(easyr)

```

```{r}
# # read gps01
# 
# gpsfiles <- as.data.frame(dir(here("input/HRS2601/gps01/raw"))) # get file names
# 
# gpsfiles$number <- right(gpsfiles$`dir(here("input/HRS2601/gps01/raw"))`, 5)
# colnames(gpsfiles) <- c("filename", "number")
# 
# # read daily files to one data frame
# for (df_row in 1:nrow(gpsfiles)) {
#    gps <- read_csv(here(paste0("input/HRS2601/gps01/raw/", gpsfiles$filename)), col_names = FALSE)
# }

# #add column names for GGA rows                   
# colnames(gps01) <- c("datetime_type","GPSTime","Latitude","NorS","Longitude","EorW","FixQuality","NumSats","HDOP","AntennaHeight","UnitsAntennaHeight","GeoidHeight","UnitGeoidHeight","ow", "CheckSum", "sixteen", "seventeen", "eighteen", "nineteen", "twenty")  
# gps01 <- gps01 |>  select("datetime_type","GPSTime","Latitude","NorS","Longitude","EorW","FixQuality","NumSats","HDOP","AntennaHeight","UnitsAntennaHeight","GeoidHeight","UnitGeoidHeight","ow", "CheckSum")               
# # filter to use only the GGA rows                  
# gps01 <- filter(gps01, NorS == "N") 
# gps01$datetime <- strtrim(gps01$datetime_type, 27)
# # select the needed columns
# gps01 <- gps01 |> select(datetime, Latitude, NorS, Longitude, EorW, FixQuality)
# 
# #check fix quality
# #  from Definitions.txt: "0=invalid, 1=GPS, 2=DGPS, 3=PPS, 4=RTK, 5=Float RTK"
# gps01$FixQuality <- as.numeric(gps01$FixQuality)
# hist(gps01$FixQuality)
# 
# gps01$lat_deg <- strtrim(gps01$Latitude, 2)
# gps01$lat_min <-right(gps01$Latitude, 7)
# gps01$lat_deg <- as.numeric(gps01$lat_deg)
# gps01$lat_min <-as.numeric(gps01$lat_min)
# gps01$lat_dec_min <- gps01$lat_min/60
# gps01$dec_lat <- gps01$lat_deg + gps01$lat_dec_min 
# 
# gps01$lon_deg <- strtrim(gps01$Longitude, 3)
# gps01$lon_min <-right(gps01$Longitude, 7)
# gps01$lon_deg <- as.numeric(gps01$lon_deg)
# gps01$lon_min <-as.numeric(gps01$lon_min)
# gps01$lon_dec_min <- gps01$lon_min/60
# gps01$dec_lon <- (gps01$lon_deg + gps01$lon_dec_min)*(-1)

```

## single file

```{r}

# 422
gps422 <- read_csv(here("input/HRS2601/gps01/raw/HS2501_gps01-2026-04-22"), show_col_types = FALSE)
#add column names for GGA rows                   
colnames(gps422) <- c("datetime_type","GPSTime","Latitude","NorS","Longitude","EorW","FixQuality","NumSats","HDOP","AntennaHeight","UnitsAntennaHeight","GeoidHeight","UnitGeoidHeight","ow", "CheckSum", "sixteen", "seventeen", "eighteen", "nineteen", "twenty")  
gps422 <- gps422 |>  select("datetime_type","GPSTime","Latitude","NorS","Longitude","EorW","FixQuality","NumSats","HDOP","AntennaHeight","UnitsAntennaHeight","GeoidHeight","UnitGeoidHeight","ow", "CheckSum")               
# filter to use only the GGA rows                  
gps422 <- filter(gps422, NorS == "N") 
gps422$datetime <- strtrim(gps422$datetime_type, 27)
# select the needed columns
gps422 <- gps422 |> select(datetime, Latitude, NorS, Longitude, EorW, FixQuality)

#check fix quality
#  from Definitions.txt: "0=invalid, 1=GPS, 2=DGPS, 3=PPS, 4=RTK, 5=Float RTK"
gps422$FixQuality <- as.numeric(gps422$FixQuality)
hist(gps422$FixQuality)

gps422$lat_deg <- strtrim(gps422$Latitude, 2)
gps422$lat_min <-right(gps422$Latitude, 7)
gps422$lat_deg <- as.numeric(gps422$lat_deg)
gps422$lat_min <-as.numeric(gps422$lat_min)
gps422$lat_dec_min <- gps422$lat_min/60
gps422$dec_lat <- gps422$lat_deg + gps422$lat_dec_min 

gps422$lon_deg <- strtrim(gps422$Longitude, 3)
gps422$lon_min <-right(gps422$Longitude, 7)
gps422$lon_deg <- as.numeric(gps422$lon_deg)
gps422$lon_min <-as.numeric(gps422$lon_min)
gps422$lon_dec_min <- gps422$lon_min/60
gps422$dec_lon <- (gps422$lon_deg + gps422$lon_dec_min)*(-1)

```

```{r}

# 423
gps423 <- read_csv(here("input/HRS2601/gps01/raw/HS2501_gps01-2026-04-23"), show_col_types = FALSE)
#add column names for GGA rows                   
colnames(gps423) <- c("datetime_type","GPSTime","Latitude","NorS","Longitude","EorW","FixQuality","NumSats","HDOP","AntennaHeight","UnitsAntennaHeight","GeoidHeight","UnitGeoidHeight","ow", "CheckSum", "sixteen", "seventeen", "eighteen", "nineteen", "twenty")  
gps423 <- gps423 |>  select("datetime_type","GPSTime","Latitude","NorS","Longitude","EorW","FixQuality","NumSats","HDOP","AntennaHeight","UnitsAntennaHeight","GeoidHeight","UnitGeoidHeight","ow", "CheckSum")               
# filter to use only the GGA rows                  
gps423 <- filter(gps423, NorS == "N") 
gps423$datetime <- strtrim(gps423$datetime_type, 27)
# select the needed columns
gps423 <- gps423 |> select(datetime, Latitude, NorS, Longitude, EorW, FixQuality)

#check fix quality
#  from Definitions.txt: "0=invalid, 1=GPS, 2=DGPS, 3=PPS, 4=RTK, 5=Float RTK"
gps423$FixQuality <- as.numeric(gps423$FixQuality)
hist(gps423$FixQuality)

gps423$lat_deg <- strtrim(gps423$Latitude, 2)
gps423$lat_min <-right(gps423$Latitude, 7)
gps423$lat_deg <- as.numeric(gps423$lat_deg)
gps423$lat_min <-as.numeric(gps423$lat_min)
gps423$lat_dec_min <- gps423$lat_min/60
gps423$dec_lat <- gps423$lat_deg + gps423$lat_dec_min 

gps423$lon_deg <- strtrim(gps423$Longitude, 3)
gps423$lon_min <-right(gps423$Longitude, 7)
gps423$lon_deg <- as.numeric(gps423$lon_deg)
gps423$lon_min <-as.numeric(gps423$lon_min)
gps423$lon_dec_min <- gps423$lon_min/60
gps423$dec_lon <- (gps423$lon_deg + gps423$lon_dec_min)*(-1)

```
```{r}

# 424
gps424 <- read_csv(here("input/HRS2601/gps01/raw/HS2501_gps01-2026-04-24"), show_col_types = FALSE)
#add column names for GGA rows                   
colnames(gps424) <- c("datetime_type","GPSTime","Latitude","NorS","Longitude","EorW","FixQuality","NumSats","HDOP","AntennaHeight","UnitsAntennaHeight","GeoidHeight","UnitGeoidHeight","ow", "CheckSum", "sixteen", "seventeen", "eighteen", "nineteen", "twenty")  
gps424 <- gps424 |>  select("datetime_type","GPSTime","Latitude","NorS","Longitude","EorW","FixQuality","NumSats","HDOP","AntennaHeight","UnitsAntennaHeight","GeoidHeight","UnitGeoidHeight","ow", "CheckSum")               
# filter to use only the GGA rows                  
gps424 <- filter(gps424, NorS == "N") 
gps424$datetime <- strtrim(gps424$datetime_type, 27)
# select the needed columns
gps424 <- gps424 |> select(datetime, Latitude, NorS, Longitude, EorW, FixQuality)

#check fix quality
#  from Definitions.txt: "0=invalid, 1=GPS, 2=DGPS, 3=PPS, 4=RTK, 5=Float RTK"
gps424$FixQuality <- as.numeric(gps424$FixQuality)
hist(gps424$FixQuality)

gps424$lat_deg <- strtrim(gps424$Latitude, 2)
gps424$lat_min <-right(gps424$Latitude, 7)
gps424$lat_deg <- as.numeric(gps424$lat_deg)
gps424$lat_min <-as.numeric(gps424$lat_min)
gps424$lat_dec_min <- gps424$lat_min/60
gps424$dec_lat <- gps424$lat_deg + gps424$lat_dec_min 

gps424$lon_deg <- strtrim(gps424$Longitude, 3)
gps424$lon_min <-right(gps424$Longitude, 7)
gps424$lon_deg <- as.numeric(gps424$lon_deg)
gps424$lon_min <-as.numeric(gps424$lon_min)
gps424$lon_dec_min <- gps424$lon_min/60
gps424$dec_lon <- (gps424$lon_deg + gps424$lon_dec_min)*(-1)

```
```{r}

# 425
gps425 <- read_csv(here("input/HRS2601/gps01/raw/HS2501_gps01-2026-04-25"), show_col_types = FALSE)
#add column names for GGA rows                   
colnames(gps425) <- c("datetime_type","GPSTime","Latitude","NorS","Longitude","EorW","FixQuality","NumSats","HDOP","AntennaHeight","UnitsAntennaHeight","GeoidHeight","UnitGeoidHeight","ow", "CheckSum", "sixteen", "seventeen", "eighteen", "nineteen", "twenty")  
gps425 <- gps425 |>  select("datetime_type","GPSTime","Latitude","NorS","Longitude","EorW","FixQuality","NumSats","HDOP","AntennaHeight","UnitsAntennaHeight","GeoidHeight","UnitGeoidHeight","ow", "CheckSum")               
# filter to use only the GGA rows                  
gps425 <- filter(gps425, NorS == "N") 
gps425$datetime <- strtrim(gps425$datetime_type, 27)
# select the needed columns
gps425 <- gps425 |> select(datetime, Latitude, NorS, Longitude, EorW, FixQuality)

#check fix quality
#  from Definitions.txt: "0=invalid, 1=GPS, 2=DGPS, 3=PPS, 4=RTK, 5=Float RTK"
gps425$FixQuality <- as.numeric(gps425$FixQuality)
hist(gps425$FixQuality)

gps425$lat_deg <- strtrim(gps425$Latitude, 2)
gps425$lat_min <-right(gps425$Latitude, 7)
gps425$lat_deg <- as.numeric(gps425$lat_deg)
gps425$lat_min <-as.numeric(gps425$lat_min)
gps425$lat_dec_min <- gps425$lat_min/60
gps425$dec_lat <- gps425$lat_deg + gps425$lat_dec_min 

gps425$lon_deg <- strtrim(gps425$Longitude, 3)
gps425$lon_min <-right(gps425$Longitude, 7)
gps425$lon_deg <- as.numeric(gps425$lon_deg)
gps425$lon_min <-as.numeric(gps425$lon_min)
gps425$lon_dec_min <- gps425$lon_min/60
gps425$dec_lon <- (gps425$lon_deg + gps425$lon_dec_min)*(-1)

```
```{r}

# 426
gps426 <- read_csv(here("input/HRS2601/gps01/raw/HS2501_gps01-2026-04-26"), show_col_types = FALSE)
#add column names for GGA rows                   
colnames(gps426) <- c("datetime_type","GPSTime","Latitude","NorS","Longitude","EorW","FixQuality","NumSats","HDOP","AntennaHeight","UnitsAntennaHeight","GeoidHeight","UnitGeoidHeight","ow", "CheckSum", "sixteen", "seventeen", "eighteen", "nineteen", "twenty")  
gps426 <- gps426 |>  select("datetime_type","GPSTime","Latitude","NorS","Longitude","EorW","FixQuality","NumSats","HDOP","AntennaHeight","UnitsAntennaHeight","GeoidHeight","UnitGeoidHeight","ow", "CheckSum")               
# filter to use only the GGA rows                  
gps426 <- filter(gps426, NorS == "N") 
gps426$datetime <- strtrim(gps426$datetime_type, 27)
# select the needed columns
gps426 <- gps426 |> select(datetime, Latitude, NorS, Longitude, EorW, FixQuality)

#check fix quality
#  from Definitions.txt: "0=invalid, 1=GPS, 2=DGPS, 3=PPS, 4=RTK, 5=Float RTK"
gps426$FixQuality <- as.numeric(gps426$FixQuality)
hist(gps426$FixQuality)

gps426$lat_deg <- strtrim(gps426$Latitude, 2)
gps426$lat_min <-right(gps426$Latitude, 7)
gps426$lat_deg <- as.numeric(gps426$lat_deg)
gps426$lat_min <-as.numeric(gps426$lat_min)
gps426$lat_dec_min <- gps426$lat_min/60
gps426$dec_lat <- gps426$lat_deg + gps426$lat_dec_min 

gps426$lon_deg <- strtrim(gps426$Longitude, 3)
gps426$lon_min <-right(gps426$Longitude, 7)
gps426$lon_deg <- as.numeric(gps426$lon_deg)
gps426$lon_min <-as.numeric(gps426$lon_min)
gps426$lon_dec_min <- gps426$lon_min/60
gps426$dec_lon <- (gps426$lon_deg + gps426$lon_dec_min)*(-1)

```
```{r}

# 427
gps427 <- read_csv(here("input/HRS2601/gps01/raw/HS2501_gps01-2026-04-27"), show_col_types = FALSE)
#add column names for GGA rows                   
colnames(gps427) <- c("datetime_type","GPSTime","Latitude","NorS","Longitude","EorW","FixQuality","NumSats","HDOP","AntennaHeight","UnitsAntennaHeight","GeoidHeight","UnitGeoidHeight","ow", "CheckSum", "sixteen", "seventeen", "eighteen", "nineteen", "twenty")  
gps427 <- gps427 |>  select("datetime_type","GPSTime","Latitude","NorS","Longitude","EorW","FixQuality","NumSats","HDOP","AntennaHeight","UnitsAntennaHeight","GeoidHeight","UnitGeoidHeight","ow", "CheckSum")               
# filter to use only the GGA rows                  
gps427 <- filter(gps427, NorS == "N") 
gps427$datetime <- strtrim(gps427$datetime_type, 27)
# select the needed columns
gps427 <- gps427 |> select(datetime, Latitude, NorS, Longitude, EorW, FixQuality)

#check fix quality
#  from Definitions.txt: "0=invalid, 1=GPS, 2=DGPS, 3=PPS, 4=RTK, 5=Float RTK"
gps427$FixQuality <- as.numeric(gps427$FixQuality)
hist(gps427$FixQuality)

gps427$lat_deg <- strtrim(gps427$Latitude, 2)
gps427$lat_min <-right(gps427$Latitude, 7)
gps427$lat_deg <- as.numeric(gps427$lat_deg)
gps427$lat_min <-as.numeric(gps427$lat_min)
gps427$lat_dec_min <- gps427$lat_min/60
gps427$dec_lat <- gps427$lat_deg + gps427$lat_dec_min 

gps427$lon_deg <- strtrim(gps427$Longitude, 3)
gps427$lon_min <-right(gps427$Longitude, 7)
gps427$lon_deg <- as.numeric(gps427$lon_deg)
gps427$lon_min <-as.numeric(gps427$lon_min)
gps427$lon_dec_min <- gps427$lon_min/60
gps427$dec_lon <- (gps427$lon_deg + gps427$lon_dec_min)*(-1)

```
```{r}

### join files

gps01 <- rbind(gps422, gps423, gps424, gps425, gps426, gps427)

gps01$datetimeISO <- gps01$datetime

gps01$datetime <- as.POSIXct(gps01$datetimeISO, tz = "GMT", format = "%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%S")

gps01 <- gps01 |> select(datetimeISO, datetime, dec_lat, dec_lon)

ggplot(gps01, aes(x = datetime, y = dec_lat))+geom_point()
ggplot(gps01, aes(x = datetime, y = dec_lon))+geom_point()
                  
elog <- read_csv(here("input/HRS2601/R2R_ELOG_HRS2601HS_FINAL_EVENTLOG_20260427_160219.csv"), show_col_types = FALSE)

ggplot(elog, aes(x = Longitude, y = Latitude))+geom_point()
ggplot(gps01, aes(x = dec_lon, y = dec_lat))+geom_point()
ggplot(gps01, aes(x = dec_lon, y = dec_lat))+geom_point()+geom_point(data = elog, aes(x = Longitude, y = Latitude), color = "blue3")

#ggplot(gps01, aes(x = datetimeCT, y = dec_lat))+geom_point()

```
```{r}
# reduce data set to 1-minute timestamps

gps01_minute0 <- subset(gps01, datetimeISO > "2026-04-22T11:49:59.125777Z")

gps01$seconds <- second(gps01$datetime)
gps01_1min <- subset(gps01,seconds == 0)

gps01_1min <- gps01_1min |> select(-seconds)

ggplot(gps01_1min, aes(x = dec_lon, y = dec_lat))+geom_point()+geom_point(data = elog, aes(x = Longitude, y = Latitude), color = "blue3")

write_csv(gps01_1min, "output/hrs2601_gps_1minute.csv")

```
# Fluorometer

```{r}

fluorfiles <- as.data.frame(dir(here("input/HRS2601/flnturt/raw"))) # get file names

fluorfiles$number <- right(fluorfiles$`dir(here("input/HRS2601/flnturt/raw"))`, 5)
colnames(fluorfiles) <- c("filename", "number")

# read daily files to one data frame
for (df_row in 1:nrow(fluorfiles)) {
   fluor <- read_tsv(here(paste0("input/HRS2601/flnturt/raw/", fluorfiles$filename)), col_names = FALSE)
}

colnames(fluor) <- c("datetime", "time","ChlChannel","ChlCount","TurbChannel", "TurbCount", "Auxiliary")  
  
fluor$datetime <- strtrim(fluor$datetime, 27)

fluor$datetimeISO <- fluor$datetime

fluor$datetime <- as.POSIXct(fluor$datetimeISO, tz = "GMT", format = "%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%S")

fluor <- fluor |> select(-time) |> relocate(datetimeISO, .before = datetime)

# Using FLNTU characterization sheet date March 6, 2026, S/N FLNTURT-090
# chl
## Scale factor 0.0121 ug/L/count
## Dark counts = 50 counts
## chl (ug/L) = scale factor x (output - dark counts)
# turb
## Scale factor = 0.0061 NTU/count # NTU = nephelometric turbidity unit
## Dark counts = 50 counts
## NTU = scale factor x (output -dark counts)

fluor$chl_ugl <- (0.0121)*(fluor$ChlCount-50)
fluor$turb_ntu <- (0.0061)*(fluor$TurbCount-50)

ggplot(fluor, aes(x = datetime, y = chl_ugl))+geom_point()
ggplot(fluor, aes(x = datetime, y = turb_ntu))+geom_point()

fluor$time_floor <- floor_date(fluor$datetime, unit = "minutes")

# calculate 1-minute average of chlorophyll and turbidity
fluor_avg <- fluor |> group_by(time_floor) |> summarize(chl_ugl = mean(chl_ugl))
turb_avg <- fluor |> group_by(time_floor) |> summarize(turb_ntu = mean(turb_ntu))
fluor_avg <- fluor_avg |> rename(datetime = time_floor)
turb_avg <- turb_avg |> rename(datetime = time_floor)

# match 1-minute average to 1-minute instantaneous coordinates
underway <- left_join(gps01_1min, fluor_avg)
underway <- left_join(underway, turb_avg)

# plot raw chl and turb
ggplot(fluor, aes(x = datetime, y = chl_ugl))+geom_point()
ggplot(fluor, aes(x = datetime, y = turb_ntu))+geom_point()

# plot averaged timeseries
ggplot(underway, aes(x = datetime, y = chl_ugl))+geom_point()
ggplot(underway, aes(x = datetime, y = turb_ntu))+geom_point()


```
# Thermosalinograph

```{r}

tsgfiles <- as.data.frame(dir(here("input/HRS2601/sbe4501/raw"))) # get file names

tsgfiles$number <- right(tsgfiles$`dir(here("input/HRS2601/sbe4501/raw"))`, 5)
colnames(tsgfiles) <- c("filename", "number")

# read daily files to one data frame
for (df_row in 1:nrow(tsgfiles)) {
   tsg <- read_csv(here(paste0("input/HRS2601/sbe4501/raw/", tsgfiles$filename)), col_names = FALSE)
}

colnames(tsg) <- c("datetime", "cond","sal")  

tsg$temp <- right(tsg$datetime, 7)
tsg$temp <- as.numeric(tsg$temp)
tsg$datetimeISO <- strtrim(tsg$datetime, 27)
  
tsg$datetime <- as.POSIXct(tsg$datetimeISO, tz = "GMT", format = "%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%S")

tsg$time_floor <- floor_date(tsg$datetime, unit = "minutes")

# calculate 1-minute average of chlorophyll and turbidity
temp_avg <- tsg |> group_by(time_floor) |> summarize(temp = mean(temp))
cond_avg <- tsg |> group_by(time_floor) |> summarize(cond = mean(cond))
sal_avg <- tsg |> group_by(time_floor) |> summarize(sal = mean(sal))

temp_avg <- temp_avg |> rename(datetime = time_floor)
cond_avg <- cond_avg |> rename(datetime = time_floor)
sal_avg <- sal_avg |> rename(datetime = time_floor)

# match 1-minute average to 1-minute instantaneous coordinates
underway <- left_join(underway, temp_avg)
underway <- left_join(underway, cond_avg)
underway <- left_join(underway, sal_avg)

# plot raw data
ggplot(tsg, aes(x = datetime, y = temp))+geom_point()
ggplot(tsg, aes(x = datetime, y = cond))+geom_point()
ggplot(tsg, aes(x = datetime, y = sal))+geom_point()

# plot averaged timeseries
ggplot(underway, aes(x = datetime, y = temp))+geom_point()
ggplot(underway, aes(x = datetime, y = cond))+geom_point()
ggplot(underway, aes(x = datetime, y = sal))+geom_point()


```

```{r}

# format and write file

underway$date <- as.POSIXct(underway$datetime, tz = "GMT", format = "%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S+%z")
underway$date <- as.character(paste0(underway$datetime, "+00:00"))

underway <- underway |> 
  rename(water_temperature_degree_c = temp) |> 
  rename(conductivity_sm = cond) |> 
  rename(salinity_psu = sal)

write_csv(underway, "output/hrs2601_ISO_underway_noMet_noPAR_noPOS.csv")

underway <- underway |> 
  select(-datetimeISO, - datetime) |>
  relocate(date, .before = dec_lat)

write_csv(underway, "output/hrs2601_underway_noMet_noPAR_noPOS.csv")

```
